pages.title: Alcohol
pages.text: $(thing)Base Alcohols$() provide no buff to the player. They can be produced by leaving various fruits, flours, or other ingredients in a $(l:mechanics/barrels)Barrel$() with water. As a bonus, when drunk any alcohol will effect your speech in chat!

pages.title: Aged Alcohol
pages.text: $(thing)Aged Alcohols$() are prepared by ageing normal alcohol for 3 months in a sealed barrel. Aged alcohol provide effects when consumed.

pages.title: Vintage Alcohol
pages.text: $(thing)Vintage Alcohols$() are prepared by further ageing aged alcohol in sealed barrels for another 3 months. These alcohols provide a stronger effect and a longer duration.

pages.title: Wine
pages.text: $(thing)Wine$() is another kind of alcohol that's made in a different way than the others. It's a complex but rewarding process that can't be automated in a machine. Check the $(l:firmalife/wine)Winemaking$() entry to learn how to craft it.$(br2)All wines also give $(item)Strength (5:20)$() in addition to another effect!

$(li)$(n)$(2)$(t:Haste 5:20)Red Wine$(li)$(t:Wither Resistance 5:20)White Wine$(li)$(t:Swim Speed 5:20)Rose Wine$(li)$(t:Jump Boost II 5:20)Sparkling Wine$(li)$(t:Knockback Resistance 5:20)Dessert Wine$()

pages.title: Milks
pages.text: $(thing)Milk$() can be aquired from most female livestock by simply right clicking them with a wood or metal bucket once familiarity is at a high enough level. (If it isn't working, make sure the buckets aren't stacked!)$(br)While it doesn't provide any buffs―And won't remove effects―It provides $(l:tfc:cooking/food_and_water#dairy)Dairy$() nutrition if drunk after eating.

pages.title: Spring Water
pages.text: Drinking $(thing)Spring Water$() warms you up by 4°C and applies a small regeneration effect while standing in it, as well as warming you.

pages.title: Sea Water
pages.text: Drinking $(thing)Sea Water$() does not hydrate you and will make you more thirsty instead. A hot body temperature can also make you more thirsty. Lost at sea? Look upwards when it's raining for some easy hydration!

pages.title: Muddy Water
pages.text: Drinking $(thing)Muddy Water$() is not recommended. Doing so will make you nauseous and give you parasites.

pages.title: Fruit Juice
pages.text: $(thing)Fruit Juice$() is a great way to condense your fruits into a longer lasting food item. Fruit juice provides the $(l:cooking/food_and_water#quenching_transient_effect)Quenching Effect$(). Which helps stave off thirst.$(br2)Fruit Juice will expire over time.$()

pages.title: Yogurt
pages.text: $(thing)Yogurt$() provides dairy nutrition similarly to milk. It can also be mixed with fruit to make $(item)Fruit Yogurt$().$(br2)Yogurt will expire over time.$()

pages.title: Fruit Smoothies
pages.text: $(thing)Smoothies$() are a powerful drink. They provide both the $(l:cooking/food_and_water#quenching_transient_effect)Quenching Effect$() and the $(l:cooking/food_and_water#cooling_transient_effect)Cooling Effect$(). They are also a great source for $(l:cooking/food_and_water#fruit)Fruit$() and $(l:cooking/food_and_water#dairy)Dairy$() nutrition.$(br2)Smoothies will expire over time.$()

pages.title: Liquid Ice Slush
pages.text: Drinking $(thing)Ice Slush$() cools you down by 4°C, perfect for summer! Also handy for traversing the beneath.
